categories.use_for: policy, public programme, institutional or government claims
categories.minimum_requirement: direct official page, circular, report, release or portal record

categories.use_for: daily signal context and public-interest developments
categories.minimum_requirement: credible outlet with clear date, author/source attribution and non-sensational framing

categories.use_for: science, health, education and explanatory topics
categories.minimum_requirement: reputed institutional, academic, educational or technical source

categories.use_for: festival, panchang, observance and cultural timing context
categories.minimum_requirement: careful wording; avoid presenting interpretive traditions as universal fact
